purpose: Generate unique per-topic full-bleed documentary images for every scene. Local images are fallback only.

global_prompt_rules.language: Prompt in English; overlay text is rendered by Remotion, not baked into images.
must_have: full-bleed composition with safe lower subtitle area
room for Chinese chapter word overlay when required
subtle film grain, natural lens depth, believable lighting
must_avoid: no embedded Chinese or English text
no UI cards, dashboards, infographic panels, charts as primary design language
no cartoon, comic, anime, vector illustration
no brand logos or recognizable copyrighted interfaces
no distorted hands, unreadable faces, broken anatomy

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Cinematic documentary still for a knowledge essay about {{topic}}. Show a symbolic quiet environment that implies {{section_claim}}: {{visual_metaphor}}. Warm archive lighting, shallow depth of field, subtle dust in the air, realistic objects, no readable text, no logos, lower third kept visually calm for subtitles. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, readable text, subtitles, presenter looking at camera, UI panels, cartoon style

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Editorial documentary B-roll image for {{topic}}. Visualize the process of turning messy information into structure: {{visual_metaphor}}. Use papers, whiteboard traces, sticky notes, diagrams, or work materials, but keep all text abstract and unreadable. Full-bleed cinematic frame, gentle side light, space in upper-left for a chapter word overlay, lower third calm for bilingual subtitles. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, legible writing, software screenshot, dashboard, vector infographic, busy lower third

prompt_templates.prompt_template: High-contrast cinematic metaphor image for chapter keyword '{{chapter_keyword}}' in a video about {{topic}}. Show {{visual_metaphor}} as a dramatic documentary scene, dark negative space on the left or top-left for large Chinese chapter text, strong directional light, controlled contrast, no embedded typography. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, text baked into image, poster design, sci-fi HUD, neon dashboard, comic look

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Realistic workplace documentary still about {{topic}}. Show a believable case moment: {{visual_metaphor}}. People should appear natural and not posed, office or meeting environment, cinematic lens, low-key lighting, observational camera angle, no readable screen text, no brand logos, lower subtitle area uncluttered. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, stock photo smile, camera-facing pose, readable slides, recognizable logo, messy subtitle area

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Cinematic documentary image for extracting a practical rule in a knowledge essay about {{topic}}. Show {{visual_metaphor}} as a clean but realistic thinking surface: whiteboard, notebook, table, documents, or mapped decisions. Text and diagrams must be abstract and unreadable. Leave space for overlay keyword '{{chapter_keyword}}'. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, polished SaaS UI, chart dashboard, legible text, corporate slide template

prompt_templates.prompt_template: Warm closing documentary still for a knowledge essay about {{topic}}. Visualize the final takeaway '{{section_claim}}' through {{visual_metaphor}}. Calm composition, natural light, sense of resolution, realistic workspace or human collaboration detail, no readable text, lower third safe for final subtitles. {{style_modifier}}
prompt_templates.negative_prompt: {{negative_base}}, triumphant advertisement, motivational poster, text overlay, fake bokeh, cartoon
